pane.title: 3D Preview

sidecarUnavailable.heading: Sidecar not connected
sidecarUnavailable.body: The 3D preview needs the local sidecar process. Restart it or check Settings → Sidecar.

empty.noYdd: No YDD mesh in the selection
empty.noYddHint: The selected drawables have no YDD mesh — assign one first.
empty.nothingHint: Select drawables in the list to view them in 3D here (multi-select = outfit).

capToast.title: Preview shows at most {{count}} drawables
capToast.description_one: {{count}} other selected drawable is not rendered.
capToast.description_other: {{count}} other selected drawables are not rendered.

pose.tooltipActive: Preview pose (statically baked into the mesh)
pose.tooltipDisabled: Set the GTA path in the settings

pane.pedBodyTooltipActive: Show the freemode body under the clothing
pane.pedBodyTooltipDisabled: Set the GTA path in the settings

character.triggerTooltipDisabled: Enable the ped body to customize the character
character.title: Character
character.pickPed: The file contains several peds — which one should be imported?
character.componentsHint: Components of the freemode body for the preview — drawable and texture index per slot.
character.faceOnlyHint: Only the face is taken from the Menyoo file (shape, skin tone, eyebrows/beard, eye colour). Clothing and hair from the file are ignored — you set those in the tool yourself.
character.faceFeaturesNote: Fine-tuners (FaceFeatures) are not shown in the preview.
character.savePresetTooltip: Save the current character as a preset

genderMismatch.title: Gender differs
genderMismatch.importDescription: The XML is for a {{xml}} ped, but the preview currently shows a {{preview}} body.
genderMismatch.presetDescription: The preset is saved for {{preset}}, but the preview currently shows {{preview}}.

faceImported.title: Face imported from “{{name}}”
faceImported.description: Only the face is applied (shape, skin tone, eyebrows/beard, eye colour). Clothing and hair from the file are ignored — you set those in the tool yourself.

character.importNoPed: The file contains no importable ped.

nameReserved.title: Name is reserved
nameReserved.description: Please choose a different preset name.

hint.props: Props (hats, glasses, watches …) are not yet shown in the preview.
hint.faceFeatures: Fine-tuners (FaceFeatures, e.g. nose width) are not shown in the preview — they stay saved.
hint.skinFallback: Skin tone could not be fully rendered — a parent skin texture is missing; the default skin is used.
hint.eyeFallback: Eye colour could not be rendered — the eye texture is missing; default eyes are used.
hint.overlayFallback: Overlay “{{label}}” was skipped — the selected variant is not available.
hint.componentFallback: Slot “{{slot}}” uses the default — drawable index not available (DLC clothing?).
